insight_events.title: EPS (basic) accelerating
insight_events.summary: EPS (basic) growth moved from +185.7% to +120.0% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Entitlement, litigation, or regulatory delay on Centennial/Grapevine and TRCC expansions extends the equity yield curve.
OCF trough: FY2025 cash from operations $6.1M vs $14.3M prior year; misread as permanent earnings power.
Development capital intensity: $46.6M real-estate purchases plus develop spend; balance-sheet risk if monetization lags.
